content: You're watching Madonna's "CONFESSIONS II - The Film". Directed by TORSO Produced by DIVISION Powered by DOLCE&GABBANA All songs taken from Confessions On A Dance Floor: Part II, out July 3 2026. Pre-order here: https://Madonna.lnk.to/Confessions2 Subscribe to the Madonna Channel! https://Madonna.lnk.to/YouTubeID Check out the Official Madonna YouTube Playlists… The Complete Madonna Videography https://Madonna.lnk.to/Videography Live Performances https://Madonna.lnk.to/LiveYT Help Us Give Back… Raising Malawi http://www.raisingmalawi.org/ The Ray of Light Foundation http://www.rayoflight.org/ Stay in touch with Madonna… https://madonna.com https://instagram.com/madonna https://tiktok.com/@madonna https://x.com/madonna https://facebook.com/madonna https://www.madonna.com/newsletter The Madonna Channel is the official YouTube home for Madonna. As the best-selling female recording artist of all time, Madonna continues to leave an indelible mark on the world through her art, music, activism and humanitarian leadership. Madonna consistently pushes boundaries, spurs conversations and unites us all through her revolutionary work. Subscribe for the latest videos, music, news and updates. Enjoy Madonna’s groundbreaking music videos, live performances, humorous videos and more.
chineseContent: 您正在观看麦当娜的“Confessions II - The Film”。由 TORSO 执导 由 DIVISION 制作 由 DOLCE&GABBANA 提供支持 所有歌曲均取自 Confessions On A Dance Floor: Part II，于 2026 年 7 月 3 日发行。在此预订：https://Madonna.lnk.to/Confessions2 订阅麦当娜频道！ https://Madonna.lnk.to/YouTubeID 查看麦当娜官方 YouTube 播放列表...完整的麦当娜视频 https://Madonna.lnk.to/Videography 现场表演 https://Madonna.lnk.to/LiveYT 帮助我们回馈...提高马拉维 http://www.raisemalawi.org/ 光之射线基金会 http://www.rayoflight.org/ 与麦当娜保持联系... https://madonna.com https://instagram.com/madonna https://tiktok.com/@madonna https://x.com/madonna https://facebook.com/madonna https://www.madonna.com/newsletter 麦当娜频道是麦当娜的官方 YouTube 主页。作为有史以来最畅销的女唱片艺术家，麦当娜继续通过她的艺术、音乐、激进主义和人道主义领导力在世界上留下不可磨灭的印记。麦当娜通过她的革命性工作不断突破界限、激发对话并团结我们所有人。订阅最新的视频、音乐、新闻和更新。欣赏麦当娜开创性的音乐视频、现场表演、幽默视频等。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
